title: Gouldia aspera

This plant is a type of shrub that belongs to the genus Gouldia, which includes several species of flowering plants. Gouldia aspera is often classified as an endangered species due to habitat destruction and other environmental factors. It is a unique and rare plant that requires specialized care and conservation efforts.

parts: Gouldia aspera is a plant species that is native to the Solomon Islands and has been used in traditional medicine.
